subject: WM-0105 ready for review
body: Added M7 external-test save compatibility policy draft; documented Web import/export instructions, breakage allowances, Windows/Web interoperability blocker, M5 save/replay hash protection and owner gates; no public save promise, save schema migration, desktop bridge, cloud/hosted save, telemetry, release, store, signing, installer, updater or M8 work; required checks passed.
